{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = The Jade
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Jade]] questions the nature of an [[Underlord]] and a Dread God.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|“What is an Underlord? How do you know about this…Dread God?”<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
